svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="系统总体架构" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-504" dy="-204" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f7f7f7;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="用户交互层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="220" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="单页 Web 控制台
static/index.html" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="30" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f7f7f7;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="后端服务层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="300" x="310" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="FastAPI 应用
app.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="45" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="采集任务调度
后台任务与维护锁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="45" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f7f7f7;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="来源适配层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="260" x="660" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="7" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="yt-dlp 视频采集" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="45" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="7" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="微博图文适配" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="45" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="7" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="X/Twitter 图文适配" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="45" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f7f7f7;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="AI 处理层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="300" x="310" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="11" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="InsightFace
人脸检测与 embedding" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="45" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="11" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="Florence-2 / ASR
视觉描述与转写" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="45" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f7f7f7;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="数据存储层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="260" x="660" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="14" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="SQLite
元数据" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="45" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="14" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="FAISS
人脸向量索引" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="45" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="5" value="REST API"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="8" value="采集请求"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="12" value="媒体与文本"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" edge="1" parent="1" source="13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="15" value="内容、人脸、人物"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" edge="1" parent="1" source="12" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="16" value="embedding"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
